ui-ux.summary: N/A - backend-only fix, no UI involved

security.summary: N/A - no auth or security surface changes

architecture.summary: Use existing github namespace in metadata.json for negative cache. Static class-level Map for search cache matching issueCache pattern.

integrations.summary: gh CLI has no rate-limit headers. Internal count-based budget. checkRateLimit() available as secondary signal every 10 searches.

performance.summary: Hard-coded 20 search budget per scanIncrements() call. YAGNI for config. Status filter reduces searches from ~161 to ~3.

edge-cases.summary: Negative cache only when zero results AND no existing main issue. If mainIssue exists but no US issues, still search.
